title: performance report
description: Headless stat-capture results compared against quality/performance-budgets.md ceilings (frame time, draw calls, triangles, memory). Violations are budget breaches, each with measured-vs-budget numbers.

method.description: how measured (automation run with stat dump, csv profile, insights trace)

violations.description: each breach with suspected cause and file/asset hint

regressions.description: metrics that got worse since the last recorded capture
